title: BPS / KPO Careers
description: Understand Business Process Services and Knowledge Process Outsourcing careers in India. Salary details, career progression, skill requirements, and real examples.
target_audience: Grade 12 and college students exploring job-ready careers
questions_it_answers: What skills do BPS jobs need?
What is career growth in BPS?
Can I earn after 12th in BPS?
What is the salary premium for communication skills?
